# Changelog

## [1.1.0](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/compare/lint-ratchet-action-v1.0.0...lint-ratchet-action-v1.1.0) (2026-06-12)


### Features

* **ci:** release-please with linked-versions, Helm RATCHET file ref, action pin ([03b963f](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/03b963fbe9fd320e6ce9d87f69455fed4b7dc83b))
* **runtime:** add selectable cursor/pi harness execution ([241bde6](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/241bde62d77d237e6101c21a2d69cc5bef93c4f9))


### Bug Fixes

* **action:** avoid using github.action_ref for runner checkout ([0f56f76](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/0f56f762686070fee1e51a3d637cf456982a3956))
* **ci:** allow ratchet to read checks/statuses ([b314ce1](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/b314ce1a7183d3159d502ec06d089e68468104b0))
* **docs:** keep agent input and remove broad Cursor branding ([ef2ab80](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/ef2ab80434224ba7e6e00a250e0c448647b1e5ed))
* retain agent input; remove broad Cursor branding ([3dc9f3a](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/3dc9f3abb124f358be8ef1c1d35ea618d0e7f3c4))
* **runner:** stream agent output and mask API key in logs ([fad6e6f](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/fad6e6fe126b674d9c729bae26536930de3591fd))


### Reverts

* remove github_token input; github.token with pull-requests: write is sufficient ([52e07dc](https://github.com/jfeldstein/agentic-lint-ratchet/commit/52e07dc3fbdf8946cad38fe5f312cb6d5da02b7d))
